title: Create: Interiors
description: A complement to the Create mod that adds new furniture.
body:
[![Interiors Banner](https://i.ibb.co/VpBf0xs/interiors.png)](https://url-shortener.curseforge.com/Q8SRA) # Create: Interiors⠀[![star](https://img.shields.io/badge/Star%20on%20GitHub-fafbfc?logo=github&logoColor=black)](https://github.com/sudoLev/CreateInteriorsMod)⠀[![discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-5865f2?logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/ynQvWygqQT)

Create: Interiors is an addon mod that extends Create's furnishing options.

Current list of features:

  • Chair Blocks
    • Come in all 16 Minecraft Dye Colors
    • Right-click with a wrench to cycle armrest state (None, Left Only, Right Only, or Both Armrests)
    • Can be crafted either from 1 Colored Wool and 2 Wooden Slabs OR from 1 Colored Seat and 1 Wooden Slab
    • Can be sat on, both as a part of contraptions and standalone.
    • Can pick up entities just like Seat blocks
    • Bouncy!


  • Kelp Chair
    • Cheaper & easier-to-farm alternative to colored chairs
    • Can be crafted either from 1 Dried Kelp and 2 Wooden Slabs OR from 1 Kelp Seat block and 1 Wooden Slab
    • Work exactly the same as colored chairs

    ⠀⠀⠀

  • Kelp Seat
    • Cheaper & easier-to-farm alternative to colored seats
    • Can be crafted from 1 Dried Kelp item and 1 Wooden Slab
    • Work exactly like Create's seat blocks
    • Can be crafted or made in a stonecutter

    ⠀⠀⠀⠀

  • Seatwood Planks
    • Useful together with Copycat Steps & Copycat Panels as a decoration for Seats & Chairs
    • 3 Seatwood Planks can be crafted from 2 Wooden Slabs and 2 Wooden Planks

    ⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀
    ⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀Seatwood Tray Tables
--- # Contributions ### Many thanks to [rdh](https://github.com/rhysdh540) for all his many critical contributions! ### Thanks to [Luna](https://modrinth.com/user/LopyLuna) for the wonderful logo :)

Translations! 🥳

**Thanks to [@AsseyGithub](https://github.com/AsseyGithub) for translating Create: Interiors to Korean.** 🎉 **Thanks to [@rim4oo](https://github.com/rim4oo) for translating Create: Interiors to Russian.** 🎉 Create: Interiors is currently available in English, German, Swedish, Russian and Korean. If you don't see your language and want to help, please do feel free! Again, it's much appreciated. ---

Find Create: Interiors on  GitHub or  CurseForge

Report Issues here
